prompt: How to publish a variable across feature sets?
actual: The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
model_raw:

The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
expected:
Use the `Publish` action — other feature sets can then read the published variable.

```aro
(PublishGreeting: Example) {
    Create the <greeting> with "Hello".
    Publish as <welcome> <greeting>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <greeting>.
}
```
